rules.text: You can play this challenge only once per week. A new week starts on Monday.
You will be presented with an endless series of questions.
Winners are selected based on the total number of questions answered correctly. Keep playing until you choose a wrong answer or your time runs out.
Ensure your battery is sufficiently charged before starting the challenge. Do not pause, minimize, or leave the game during gameplay.
Only players who provide a valid means of contact in their profile are eligible to be selected.
You agree that we may display your picture, church name, or social media handles on our social media platforms.
You may check other players' scores before starting the challenge so you can aim to surpass them.
Your family and friends may assist you, but do not minimize or close Big Bible Naija during gameplay.
